---
title: "Get Learn Bioinformatics"
image: img/profile.png

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:info.getlearnbioinformatics@gmail.com

    - icon: facebook
      href: https://facebook.com/getlearnbioinformatics
      target: _blank

    - text: "FB Group"
      href: https://facebook.com/groups/934011292608963/
      target: _blank

    - icon: youtube
      href: https://youtube.com/@getlearn_bioinformatics
      target: _blank

    - icon: instagram
      href: https://instagram.com/p/DVtQOwqiUXX/
      target: _blank
---
